title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Om Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Om Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
